title: Mascarponey Monsoon Delight
description: A tangy and gooey Thai-inspired dessert featuring mascarpone as the star ingredient, made egg-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup fresh mango puree (or apple cider vinegar for tanginess)
Juice from 1 lime (optional, for additional tanginess)

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine mascarpone cheese with fresh mango puree and salt.
If desired, add lime juice to taste. Mix well until the mixture is smooth and evenly combined.
Garnish with fresh mango chunks and sprinkle cinnamon on top if using.
Serve chilled as an appetizer or dessert.
